outstandingCases.note: Total outstanding employment tribunal cases (single and multiple) at year end, England, Scotland and Wales.

avgTimeToHearing.note: Average time from claim receipt to final hearing for single employment tribunal claims, weeks.

annualReceipts.note: Annual new employment tribunal claims (single claims only), Great Britain.

sources.name: HMCTS
sources.dataset: HMCTS management information — tribunal outstanding cases

metadata.methodology: Outstanding caseload from HMCTS management information, measured at end of each calendar year. Average time to hearing from MOJ quarterly statistics — single claims only (multiple claims have different jurisdictions). Annual receipts exclude multiple claim cases to allow year-on-year comparison.
knownIssues: 2013 introduction of ET fees reduced receipts substantially — abolished in 2017 following Supreme Court ruling, causing structural uplift in claims
2020 outstanding cases spike reflects pandemic court closures rather than increased claims alone
Average time to hearing masks wide variation by jurisdiction — discrimination and unfair dismissal claims typically longer than wages/holiday pay
